## PR Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test improvement

## PR Checklist

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] Full type hints on new/changed functions
- [ ] Docstrings updated (Google style)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added
- [ ] Zero new **required** deps in core
- [ ] User-facing strings in locale files (not hard-coded)
- [ ] No secrets logged (scrubbing applied)
- [ ] `mypy --strict` passes
